intended_use: Zero-shot candidate generation and uncertainty triage for detected Cirsium head images. Outputs are not annotations or validated trait measurements.

yes: a close-up photograph of a thistle flower head with open visible florets at anthesis
a Cirsium capitulum with clearly open tubular florets visible
no: a close-up photograph of a closed thistle bud with no open florets
a Cirsium flower head before anthesis with florets not visibly open
uncertain: a thistle flower head where the opening stage is unclear
a partially obscured or senescent thistle head with uncertain anthesis

upright: a thistle flower head held upright above its peduncle
a Cirsium capitulum with a vertical upright head orientation
ascending: a thistle flower head angled upward on an ascending peduncle
a Cirsium capitulum facing upward at an oblique angle
horizontal: a thistle flower head held horizontally sideways from its peduncle
a Cirsium capitulum oriented sideways at about a right angle to the stem
nodding: a thistle flower head nodding downward on a curved peduncle
a Cirsium capitulum bent downward but not hanging vertically
pendant: a thistle flower head hanging vertically downward from the peduncle
a pendant Cirsium capitulum suspended downward

white_or_cream: a close-up photograph of a thistle flower head with white or cream florets
a Cirsium capitulum with pale white florets
pale_pink: a close-up photograph of a thistle flower head with very pale pink florets
a Cirsium capitulum with light blush pink flowers
pink: a close-up photograph of a thistle flower head with pink florets
a Cirsium capitulum with clear medium pink flowers
purple_blue: a close-up photograph of a thistle flower head with purple or blue florets
a Cirsium capitulum with violet purple flowers
yellow_or_other: a thistle flower head with yellow or another non white non pink non purple floret colour
a Cirsium capitulum with unusual yellow orange red or other coloured florets
mixed: a thistle flower head with visibly mixed floret colours
a Cirsium capitulum showing more than one clearly visible flower colour

globose: a side view of a thistle flower head with a round globose spherical involucre outline
a Cirsium capitulum with a nearly spherical head shape
hemispherical: a side view of a thistle flower head with a half-spherical hemispherical outline
a Cirsium capitulum shaped like a rounded dome
ovoid: a side view of a thistle flower head with an egg-shaped ovoid outline
a Cirsium capitulum broader at one end with an ovoid head shape
cylindrical: a side view of a thistle flower head with a long cylindrical involucre outline
a Cirsium capitulum with a narrow tube-like cylindrical head shape
urceolate: a side view of a thistle flower head with an urn-shaped urceolate involucre outline
a Cirsium capitulum narrowed at the mouth with an urn-like shape

glabrous: a close-up of a thistle involucre with a smooth hairless glabrous surface
a Cirsium flower head with no visible hairs on the involucral bracts
webby: a close-up of a thistle involucre with sparse cobwebby hairs
a Cirsium flower head with thin web-like arachnoid hairs on the bracts
tomentose: a close-up of a thistle involucre densely covered in woolly tomentose hairs
a Cirsium flower head with a thick fuzzy felt-like bract surface
glandular: a close-up of a thistle involucre with glandular hairs or sticky glands
a Cirsium flower head with visible gland-tipped hairs on the bracts
mixed: a thistle involucre with more than one visible hair type
a Cirsium flower head with mixed hairiness across the involucral bracts

unarmed: a close-up of a thistle involucre with bract tips that have no spines
a Cirsium flower head with unarmed blunt involucral-bract tips
short_spined: a close-up of a thistle involucre with short spine-tipped bracts
a Cirsium flower head with small short spines at the bract tips
long_spined: a close-up of a thistle involucre with long prominent sharp bract spines
a Cirsium flower head with elongated spiny involucral-bract tips

appressed: a thistle involucre with bracts pressed closely against the head
a Cirsium flower head with appressed involucral bracts
spreading: a thistle involucre with bracts spreading outward from the head
a Cirsium flower head with outward-pointing involucral bracts
recurved: a thistle involucre with bract tips curved backward or recurved
a Cirsium flower head with involucral bracts bending back away from the head
mixed: a thistle involucre with visibly mixed bract orientations
a Cirsium flower head where some bracts are appressed and others spread or recurved

external_mucilage_visible.reason: Generic observer photographs are normally inadequate for reliable positive or negative mucilage scoring. This requires targeted macro images and is kept out of automatic trait assignment.
